channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 54/100 (building)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 54/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister criticises police anti-racism guidance following riot over Henry Nowak death – UK politics live
item.description: Minister criticises police anti-racism guidance following riot over Henry Nowak death – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): David Cameron offered Boris Johnson senior Cabinet role if he agreed not to push for Brexit
item.description: David Cameron offered Boris Johnson senior Cabinet role if he agreed not to push for Brexit

item.title: The Times: Henry Nowak case: police racism guidance ‘wrong’, says minister - The Times
item.description: Henry Nowak case: police racism guidance ‘wrong’, says minister - The Times

item.title: Independent UK Politics: The one person who should be in the Mandelson files – but barely features
item.description: The one person who should be in the Mandelson files – but barely features

item.title: Independent UK Politics: In The Room | Mandelson files: 1,504 pointless pages?
item.description: In The Room | Mandelson files: 1,504 pointless pages?

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Mandelson messages could form a manual in the dark arts of wielding power and keeping it

item.title: FT UK Politics: Minister condemns riots after UK rightwing leaders call for ‘rage’ over student killing

item.title: Sky News Politics: 'Keir Starmer made us promises - and we thought they'd be kept'

item.title: The Telegraph: Starmer’s military spending plan to be unveiled next week - The Telegraph
